title: Gemma 4 and the AI Edge Gallery: On-Device AI Gets an Upgrade
summary: Gemma 4 is a new open-source model available through the Google AI Edge Gallery app, which supports on-device inference with agent skills framework for tasks like offline question answering and structured data generation. The 2B model now matches prior year 27B performance, with over five million downloads in the first month and upcoming MCP integration planned for Android and iOS.
writeup: This video introduces Gemma 4, Google's latest open-source language models tuned for on-device deployment, and the AI Edge Gallery app that runs them. The headline result is efficiency gains: the 2B model now matches the performance of the previous year's 27B dense model, a compression that makes capable models practical on local hardware. Gemma 4 ships through the AI Edge Gallery with offline inference, an agent skills framework, and MCP integration described as upcoming.
